meanings.definition: a subdivision of a particular kind of thing
examples: what type of sculpture do you prefer?

meanings.definition: a person of a specified kind (usually with many eccentricities)
(biology) the taxonomic group whose characteristics are used to define the next higher taxon

examples: small type is hard to read

meanings.definition: all of the tokens of the same symbol
examples: the word `element' contains five different types of character

meanings.definition: a small metal block bearing a raised character on one end; produces a printed character when inked and pressed on paper
examples: he dropped a case of type, so they made him pick them up

meanings.definition: write by means of a keyboard with types
identify as belonging to a certain type
examples: Such people can practically be typed
